nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or incomplete idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me fleshout ideas for research projects

nodes.label: AI as coding assistant for unfamiliar languages
nodes.label_negative: AI as error-prone code writer requiring extensive troubleshooting
nodes.grounding_span: I have had it assist me in writting R scripts because I don't actually know R

nodes.label: Personal validation and ownership of research ideas
nodes.label_negative: Delegating validation and fine-tuning to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do the validation and fine tuning of project aims on my own

nodes.label: Reading papers for deep comprehension and memory
nodes.label_negative: Using AI to summarize papers at the cost of personal retention
nodes.grounding_span: I find that I don't commit other peoples research into my memory unless I read the papers myself

nodes.label: Skill preservation through personal practice
nodes.label_negative: Skill atrophy from over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that I would start to lose the skills needed to read that type of literature

nodes.label: Research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it will allow me to handle a larger amount of data or projects with greater ease

nodes.label: Personal intellectual ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure that any ideas that I develop are largely my own

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as delegated employee
nodes.grounding_span: once the script is validated and working it feels pretty satisfying to have the final product

nodes.label: Frustration with AI iteration management
nodes.grounding_span: it never gets it right the first time

nodes.label: Deliberate resistance to AI in reading and validation tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I do the validation and fine tuning of project aims on my own

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I take into account the response and fine tune my next prompt input

nodes.label: Deliberate skill preservation through manual practice
nodes.grounding_span: If I already have the skill I tend to utilize it rather than have AI do the task for me
